name: Ryuji Takayama
description:
Possible (doubt it tho), Food play, Praise Kink

He is a regular at your diner although he may look big and scary he really isn’t. Throughout the years you’ve known him he’s tried to get you to go out with him. Why you reject him I don’t know. But hey give him a chance...or not. I don’t know why you wouldn’t.

Notes: I feel like I should have used this prompt for a different character and just saved him for a different one. Just doesn’t feel like what i invision this character.

What do you guys think?
creator: FallenPeople
